seo.title: Home
seo.description: Cider is a community-ran software company focused on creating the best experience for end users. Discover a new cross-platform Apple Music experience.

hero.title: Listening to Music
hero.subtitle: Redefined
hero.description: Immerse yourself in a beautifully crafted, wildly fast Apple Music app. Built from the ground up for true music lovers, offering unparalleled performance and customization.

features_section.label: Features
features_section.title: Built for Modern Music Lovers
features_section.description: Experience your favorite tracks like never before. With a meticulously designed interface and ultra-responsive performance, Cider lets the music take center stage.

seamless_integrations.title: Seamless Integrations
seamless_integrations.description: Cider comes with out-of-the-box integration with services like Discord, Last.fm, Spotify, and many more.

audio_enhancements.title: Audio Enhancements
audio_enhancements.description: Audio Spatialization, Adrenaline Processor™, and equalizers are actively developed by our local audio engineer, Maikiwi.

remote_controllable.title: Remote Controllable
remote_controllable.description: No matter what you're doing away from your keyboard, you can control Cider however you like with Cider Remote.

fast.title: Fast as F*ck
fast.description: Cider has native backends for each operating system. This ensures minimal overhead and maximum performance.

customize.title: Customize however you like
customize.description: Built with customization in mind, you can customize your app from top to bottom! Cider also includes a robust plugin system for those who want to go the extra mile.

much_more.title: And Much More!
much_more.description: Cider is jam-packed with features, and we're always adding more. We are always looking for new ideas and suggestions from our users, so join our
